title: Glowroots Two Electric Boogaloo
description: Adds a new biome called the glowing caverns with new mobs and a boss to boot!
body:
This mod adds a new biome the glowing cavern and new mobs

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c57f7cd8536c6077381a73ef2bfc19a76c01bb1.png)

The Sporeback a turtle like mob the propells itself usign sound

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e3154c4cc9e51ae3ac0049d75d4ab57ca8473c1.png)

The Lumishroom a trader that sells glowing related items

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5cf98dfc6f378d647a69e586f591616b8d1839e.png)

Gleamer a creeper like mob that explodes and leaves a sporecloud

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f5b1cb99a2877a1631360fdec2f1cf126231529.png)

Glow frog a big from you can tame using glow inksacs

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcad448c6dbe3184b89eab09a708b06e6de74d4d.png)

Lumirot the boss can be activated using a shimmer core

Needs geckolib
